ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry Schneider, via Zoom, for and with Guido Nunez Mujica, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports of recently receiving an order from the court dated Aug-31-2022 which allows the trust named assets from decedent's terminated trust to become probate assets of the estate. Counsel advises that the next step will be consideration of the sale of the real property asset in the estate that was previously named in the trust and once disposition of the real property asset is completed, the estate will then be in a position for preparation of a petition for final distribution. The court thanks counsel for the update but reminds him that if this matter is continued, the court expects the filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve status of administration before the next calling of this matter.

After additional discussion, the status hearing is continued to Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition Of Executor, Guido Nunez Mujica, To Declare Trust Titled Property As Assets Of Probate Estate
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry A. Schneider, via Zoom, for and with Guido N. Mujica, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the IRA issue and that it has been included in this petition and proposed order when it doesn't appear that it is titled in the name of the trust. Counsel advises of difficulties with contacting Merrill Lynch and offers advocacy for the request to include the IRA in the trust. Counsel points the court to the sixteen-page supporting document he filed regarding the preceding including regarding account statement ending in 52.

After additional discussion, the matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the petition being duly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 15, 2021 is admitted to probate. Guido Nunez Mujica is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
